# Lisa T. Miller

> Lisa T. Miller is an AI in healthcare strategist with 25 years of experience. She generated $250 million in sales at VIE Healthcare, authored The Executive YES. She helps healthcare practices and organizations use AI to fix revenue leaks, automate workflows, and become visible in AI search results.

## Pages
- [Home](https://lisatmiller.ai/)
- [Services](https://lisatmiller.ai/services/)
- [About Lisa T. Miller](https://lisatmiller.ai/about-lisa-t-miller/)
- [AI for Healthcare](https://lisatmiller.ai/ai-healthcare/)
- [AI for the Business of Healthcare](https://lisatmiller.ai/ai-business-of-healthcare/)
- [Resources](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/)
- [Contact](https://lisatmiller.ai/contact/)

## Key Topics
- AI for healthcare practices: 24/7 call answering, automated scheduling, dormant patient recall
- AI for the business of healthcare: workflow automation, insurance verification, speed to lead
- Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) for healthcare: making practices visible in AI search
- Revenue leak diagnosis for healthcare practices
- HIPAA-aware AI implementation

## About Lisa T. Miller
- 25 years in healthcare sales and leadership
- Generated $250 million in sales at VIE Healthcare
- Author of "The Executive YES"
- - Based in Palm Beach Gardens, FL
- Contact: lisa@lisatmiller.com, 786-214-9024
